strengths: Currently architecting AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq—hands-on expertise with cutting-edge agentic technologies foundational to AI platform strategy
20+ years of consistent senior/staff-level software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure; demonstrated ability to scale systems handling millions of requests per second
Strong track record of teaching and knowledge-sharing through public talks, workshops, and open-source contributions; proven ability to distill complex concepts for diverse technical audiences
concerns: AI/ML expertise is concentrated in recent 15-month role; remainder of 20-year career focused on traditional software engineering rather than AI platform development or recognized thought leadership
No advanced degree in AI or machine learning—preferred qualification not represented; formal AI/ML training not evident in educational background
Limited evidence of director-level strategic advisory or C-suite influence; resume demonstrates strong individual contribution and mentoring but not shaping company-wide transformative initiatives

key_factors.factor: Current hands-on AI-infrastructure expertise with MCP and agentic frameworks
20+ years exceeding requirement with consistent senior technical leadership
Recent entry into AI specialization versus established recognized expertise

response.justification: Smith exceeds the 15-year requirement with 20+ years of consistent senior-level engineering across cloud, infrastructure, and full-stack domains. His current role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks provides hands-on expertise with technologies driving AI platform strategy. His track record scaling high-throughput systems and mentoring across multiple roles establishes the technical credibility and communication skills needed for director-level advising. While his focused AI expertise is recent (15 months), his hands-on involvement with agentic workflows and infrastructure tooling directly addresses current market needs and provides foundation for establishing recognized thought leadership in a rapidly evolving domain.
